data.title: Pembina Pipeline Announces Positive Final Investment Decision on the Greenlight Electricity Centre
data.description: Pembina Pipeline Corporation, Morgan Stanley Infrastructure Partners, and Kineticor Asset Management have made a significant announcement regarding the Greenlight Electricity Centre Limited Partnership. The three partners have collectively reached a final investment decision on the Greenlight Electricity Centre project, which involves constructing a 932-megawatt gas-fired combined cycle power plant. The project, known as GLEC, is set to proceed following this positive decision.

data.title: Boliden statement regarding speculation on a potential acquisition of shares in Nexa Resources
data.description: In a recent development on July 2, 2026, Boliden, a company based in Stockholm, has acknowledged rumors surrounding a potential purchase of shares in Nexa Resources. Boliden has verified ongoing talks with Nexa Resources as well as Votorantim, the majority stakeholder in Nexa Resources, concerning a probable acquisition.

data.title: Fiduciary Services Group Acquires Pension Investors Corporation, Expanding Its Retirement Plan Administration Platform
data.description: On July 2, 2026, Fiduciary Services Group (FSG), the umbrella organization of DWC – The 401(k) Experts, successfully completed the acquisition of Pension Investors Corporation. This Florida-based third-party administrator (TPA) boasts over four decades of expertise catering to businesses, advisors, and clients. This acquisition marks a significant milestone for both companies, combining their strengths and experience in the financial services sector.

data.title: Metacon granted approximately SEK 111 million from Klimatklivet for hydrogen production reference plant in Uppsala
data.description: In Stockholm on July 2, 2026, Metacon AB (publ) announced that they have been awarded a maximum of SEK 111 million in funding from Klimatklivet. This financial support will facilitate the establishment of a 10-megawatt electrolysis facility in Uppsala. The purpose of this plant is to locally manufacture green hydrogen for industrial applications and promote eco-friendly transportation, free from fossil fuels.

data.title: Data Center Certification Market worth $3.05 billion by 2032 - Exclusive Report by MarketsandMarkets™
data.description: In July 2, 2026, in DELRAY BEACH, Florida, the data center certification market is anticipated to surge to USD 3.05 billion by 2032, up from the estimated USD 1.16 billion in 2026. This growth represents a compound annual growth rate of 17.4%. The market insights include analysis from 170 tables and 75 figures.

data.title: Circus Receives UAE Regulatory Certification — Commercial Rollout Begins in Abu Dhabi
data.description: MUNICH--Circus SE, a top technology company specializing in AI software and robotics for autonomous sustainment systems, has recently obtained official regulatory approval to deploy and bring in its autonomous robotic systems to the United Arab Emirates. The certification, granted by the UAE Ministry of Industry and Advanced Technology under the Emirates Conformity Assessment Scheme (ECAS), positions Circus as the sole certified provider as of now. Circus SE is identified by the WKN code A2YN35, ISIN DE000A2YN355, and is listed on XETRA as CA1.

data.title: Infineon opens the world's largest fab for power semiconductors and analog/mixed-signal technologies in Dresden
data.description: The expansion of the manufacturing base for advanced power semiconductors through a 5 billion euro investment is set to generate 1,000 new jobs at the "Smart Power Fab" facility. These Infineon chips play a crucial role in providing energy-efficient solutions for automotive and industrial sectors, including power supplies for AI data centers, among others.

data.title: Nvidia Partners With 'Neoclouds' Sharon AI, Firmus Technologies
data.description: Nvidia recently revealed collaborations with Sharon AI and Firmus Technologies in the field of cloud computing. The tech giant's stock has faced challenges due to worries regarding "circular financing". This new alliance with the innovative Neoclouds Sharon AI and Firmus Technologies aims to enhance Nvidia's position in the market.

data.title: Weak Jobs Report Dampens Fed Rate-Hike Odds; S&P 500 Futures Rise (Live Coverage)
data.description: In June, only 57,000 new jobs were added, causing the unemployment rate to decrease to 4.2%. This weak jobs report has led to a decrease in the likelihood of a Fed rate hike. Despite this, S&P 500 futures have risen.

data.title: Tesla Deliveries Soar To 480,126 In Q2; But EV Giant's Stock Falls (Live Coverage)
data.description: During the second quarter, Tesla reported a significant increase in deliveries, surpassing expectations with a total of 480,126 vehicles delivered, marking a substantial rise from the previous quarter and the same period last year. Despite the positive delivery numbers, Tesla's stock experienced a decline from its near buy point. This information provides insights into the performance of the electric vehicle giant, showcasing strong delivery numbers amidst fluctuations in its stock value.
